issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting completeness.

scenarios.name: Reactive cross-component storage for theme and API key
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses useStorage from @plasmohq/storage/hook with default values so state syncs automatically between popup and content scripts; baseline wires raw chrome.storage.local with onChanged listeners and re-implements sync by hand.

scenarios.name: Type-safe popup-to-background save messaging
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls sendToBackground({ name: 'save-item', body }) from @plasmohq/messaging and pairs it with src/background/messages/save-item.ts exporting a PlasmoMessaging.MessageHandler; baseline relies on chrome.runtime.sendMessage with manual onMessage switches.
